interpretation: Adjustment review records graph assumptions and warnings; it does not prove identification.

items.collider_warning: Do not adjust for downstream decision score.
items.mediator_warning: Service quality may be mediator for some support interventions.

items.collider_warning: Do not condition on receiving service after the intervention.
items.mediator_warning: Support intensity may mediate barrier reduction effects.

items.collider_warning: Outcome-based quality flags may be colliders.
items.mediator_warning: Quality may mediate institutional redesign effects.

items.candidate_adjustment: case mix and historical score distribution
items.collider_warning: Changing the rule does not change underlying need.
items.mediator_warning: Downstream resource allocation may mediate outcomes.
